response.justification: The candidate is a strong staff-level generalist with 15+ years of software engineering across TypeScript, Node.js, cloud (AWS CDK), and Kubernetes, and his current work on MCP code generators and agentic-workflow infrastructure directly touches two of the role's key technologies. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, and his AI-specific experience spans roughly one year, with no demonstrated RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation-pipeline work. He could be worth a screening call for the MCP and agentic tooling depth, but he does not meet the core GenAI experience bar as written.
strengths: Hands-on MCP server tooling and agentic-workflow infrastructure experience in his current staff role, both explicitly listed key technologies
15+ years of production full-stack engineering with TypeScript, Node.js, AWS CDK, and Kubernetes, including high-throughput low-latency systems
Proven mentoring and knowledge-sharing track record (workshops, conference talks, multi-day courses) that maps to the customer-facing enablement side of an FDE role
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions; documented AI work covers roughly the last year
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines, all core required or key technologies
Limited demonstrated experience leading technical discovery with enterprise customers and integrating AI products into customer legacy systems

key_factors.factor: Insufficient production GenAI experience vs 8-year requirement
Staff-level engineering breadth and mentoring record
